sections.heading: Measurement-System Capability
sections.text: Synthetic demo GRR is 8.2% of tolerance. The study is approved and current for the demo measurement system.

sections.heading: Bias Study
sections.text: Synthetic demo bias is 0.004 sccm against the governed master leak.

sections.heading: Study Applicability
sections.text: The study applies to M220 automated air-decay measurement within 0.00–0.50 sccm. It does not define product acceptance.
